title: あなたはSecurity Analystです。OWASP Top 10を参考に分析します。 ## チェック項目 - SQLインジェクション - XSS - CSRF - 認証・認可の不備 - 機密情報のハードコード - コマンドインジェクション ## 評価（3点満点） 3点: 問題なし 2点: 軽微な懸念 1点: 要対応 0点: 重大な脆弱性 ## 出力形式（JSON） { "score": 0-3, "vulnerabilities": [{ "severity": "critical|high|medium|low", "type": "", "description": "", "rem...
summary_text: {"score":1,"vulnerabilities":[{"severity":"medium","type":"command_injection","description":"`~/.claude/auto-task/run-poller.sh:6-13`, `run-scheduler.sh:5-11`, and `run-gha24.sh:5-12` execute `source \"$HOME/.claude/auth.env\"` and `eval \"$(grep ... ~/.zshrc)\"` before unattended launchd-style execution. This is not externally reachable over HTTP, but it creates a local code-execution/persistence path if either file is modified by another local process or a prior compromise. The fallback wrappers use a safer parser, so the risk is concentrated in `auto-task`.","remediation":"Remove `source` and `eval` from these wrappers. Reuse `~/.claude/fallback/bin/load-env-from-zshrc.py` or an equivalent strict parser for both `auth.env` and `.zshrc`, allowlist exact variable names, reject shell metacharacters and command substitution, and fail closed when parsing is ambiguous."},{"severity":"high","type":"authentication_authorization","description":"Secrets are loaded broadly and then inherited by child processes with insufficient scrubbing. `~/.claude/fallback/run-orchestrator.sh:12-24` exports high-value credentials such as `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`, `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY`, and `CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN`. `~/.claude/fallback/orchestrator.sh:1017-1052` launches delegate scripts without a reduced environment, `~/.claude/auto-task/lib/task-executor.js:27-30`, `vote-bridge.js:130-133`, `tutti-analyzer.js:72-75`, and `gha24-submit.js:33-36` also pass full `process.env`, and `~/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/safe-env.js:17-21` only redacts OpenAI keys. This violates least privilege and increases the blast radius if any delegate, CLI, cache, or model output path leaks environment data.","remediation":"Adopt a deny-by-default child-process environment policy. Pass only the minimum variables needed per subprocess, expand `safe-env` to cover all provider and service secrets, separate orchestration credentials from model credentials, and avoid exposing service-role tokens to delegates that do not require them."},{"severity":"medium","type":"sensitive_data_exposure","description":"Observed filesystem permissions are too broad for a multi-user host: `/Users/masayuki`, `~/.claude`, `~/.claude/fallback`, `~/.claude/fallback/logs`, `~/.claude/auto-task`, and `~/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts` are `755`. In addition, `~/.claude/cache/codex-summaries` is `755` and cached full outputs are `644`, while `~/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:587-592` writes full delegate output there without forcing `0600`. No live secret strings were detected by regex in the scanned logs, but prompts, model outputs, issue content, and future accidental secret disclosures would be readable by other local users on the same machine.","remediation":"Tighten directory permissions to `700` for user-private runtime areas and force `0600` on cached output/log files. Store full model outputs only in protected directories, apply redaction before persistence where feasible, and review existing world-readable caches/logs for sensitive content before retention continues."}],"summary":"OWASP観点では、SQLインジェクション・XSS・CSRFに該当するWeb/DB処理は今回の対象範囲では確認できませんでした。ハードコード秘密もスキャン対象ファイル内では未検出で、ログにも典型的なAPIキー/トークンの平文は見つかっていません。主要な要対応事項は、(1) `auto-task` wrapper の `source`/`eval` によるローカルコード実行リスク、(2) API鍵やサービスロール鍵の過剰な環境変数継承、(3) `755/644` のディレクトリ・キャッシュ・ログ権限です。依存関係は `auto-task` の `zod` 3.25.76 が主で、`npm audit` はネットワーク制限により `registry.npmjs.org` へ到達できず、CVE照合は未完了です。したがって『重大な即時侵害』は未確認ですが、『要対応』評価が妥当です。"}
